title: Add Migration Status Filter to Field List
story: As an end user, I want to filter the field list by migration status, so that I can focus on fields in a specific workflow state.
description: Add a filter option to the migration field list that allows users to filter by migration status (Not Reviewed, No Migration, In Progress, Blocked, QA, Business Review, Completed).
acceptance_criteria: A migration status filter is available on the field list page
Filter supports all migration status values
Filtered results update the table in real time
Filter can be cleared to show all fields
ux_changes: New dropdown or filter control for migration status added to the field list page.
middleware_changes: Backend query updated to support filtering by migration status.
comment_summary: Developer completed the filter on staging and submitted for review.
